pohang.name: Pohang 2022
pohang.note: All Pohang 2022 NIDR records geocode to Guryongpo-eup town centroid (129.568°E, 35.999°N), east of published bbox.

A.note: Variant A equals the §3.1 Pohang baseline exactly (Sentinel-only label).

B.skipped: n_nidr_records_in_bbox = 0 — all Pohang-filtered NIDR records geocode to Guryongpo-eup (129.568°E, 35.999°N) east of the published bbox; NIDR-augmented variants cannot be constructed.

C.skipped: n_nidr_records_in_bbox = 0 — all Pohang-filtered NIDR records geocode to Guryongpo-eup (129.568°E, 35.999°N) east of the published bbox; NIDR-augmented variants cannot be constructed.

D.skipped: n_nidr_records_in_bbox = 0 — all Pohang-filtered NIDR records geocode to Guryongpo-eup (129.568°E, 35.999°N) east of the published bbox; NIDR-augmented variants cannot be constructed.
